name: pluginhub
description: qxbyte's Claude Code / CodeBuddy plugin marketplace. Currently hosts specode (spec-driven workflow), task-swarm (multi-agent orchestration) and obsidian-wiki (Obsidian LLM-Wiki maintenance); more plugins to come.

plugins.name: specode
plugins.description: Lightweight spec-driven workflow: orchestrates superpowers skills per phase, lands 3 fixed docs (requirements/design/implementation-log). v3.0–3.3 progressively land specode-distill / AI-EDS P3-2 / FIX-1/2/3 / 方案 D / M8 cache drift hint. v3.4.0 lands v0.9 M1+M9 — autonomous-mode defaults (5 schema keys + 5 env vars + read-defaults/write-default/reset-default verbs)；SKILL.md 改约：每个 AskUserQuestion 调用前 check non-interactive，有 effective default 时跳过用 default。Default schema interactive=true，零行为变化。

plugins.name: task-swarm
plugins.description: Multi-agent task orchestration: split a task document into task groups, fork coders, and run per-group reviewer + validator loops. v0.5–0.8 lands FIX-1/2 + 方案 D + inbox sentinel + lifecycle group (M7 init dedupe + M2 run-loop + M3 pipeline-end validator). **0.9.2 撤销方案 A**：round 5/6 实测证明 Claude Code subagent 无 Skill tool 权限（persona md `tools:` 字段对 host-level tool 不生效）。删 3 persona md「## superpowers 集成」段 + tools 去 Skill。保留方案 B：_prompt.py 渲染 task.md 「## 开发纪律 (范式参考)」段，按 role × mode 列 4 skill 名作为**范式标识**而非 invoke 目标，subagent 用 native 跑流程拿 superpowers 90% 价值（round 4 16/16 + round 5 3/3 native fallback 实测 0 差错）。

plugins.name: obsidian-wiki
plugins.description: Maintain an Obsidian LLM-Wiki: deterministic structure layer (Home tree / READMEs / partition pages), SpecIn->knowledge-base distillation + MEMORY, content curation (lint/ingest/curate), and a unified orchestrator. Generic code + per-vault .wiki/config.json, zero hardcoded structure.
